control_awareness: Control P2P-C-001 requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Control P2P-C-002 prevents self-approval, so requester cannot approve. Control P2P-C-003 requires approval before purchase order issuance under normal conditions.
expected_control_effect: The created purchase request will trigger the appropriate approval workflow at the department head level, ensuring segregation of duties and pre-PO approval compliance.
overall_reason: Given the absence of quarter-end pressure and the total amount of 1,750,000 requiring department head approval, it is operationally reasonable and simpler to submit one consolidated purchase request with normal routing to comply with all controls and ensure clear audit trail.
reason: The purchase amount exceeds the manager approval threshold but is below the division head threshold, so department head approval is required. Since there is no quarter-end or approval lead-time pressure, a single consolidated purchase request covering the entire amount is appropriate.
